wine_tours.name: Bordeaux Wine Trips
wine_tours.description: Boutique tour operator based in Bordeaux city offering half-day and full-day private and small-group tours to the Medoc, Saint-Emilion, and Sauternes. Bilingual English-French guides; access to crus classes beyond standard open hours.
tour_types: Blending workshop at a cru classe
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 95 per person half-day to EUR 350 per person full-day private

wine_tours.name: Ophorus Bordeaux Wine Tours
wine_tours.description: Premium private wine tour operator operating across Bordeaux, Sauternes and the Right Bank. Specialises in access to estate owners and winemakers for immersive cellar-door meetings.
tour_types: Saint-Emilion village and vineyard walking tour
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 120 per person group tours to EUR 500 per person private

wine_tours.name: Bordeaux Wine Bus (Keolis/Transgironde)
wine_tours.description: Regional bus service operated seasonally from Bordeaux Gare Saint-Jean into the Medoc appellations and to Saint-Emilion, designed as a day-tripper wine-tour network with chateau stops included.
tour_types: Medoc day-trip bus tour with chateau stops
languages: English on-board guide on premium departures
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 12-22 per person per day-trip route

wine_tours.name: Medoc Vintage Tours
wine_tours.address: Place du General de Gaulle, 33250 Pauillac, France
wine_tours.description: Pauillac-based operator offering Medoc-specific classified-growth tours with a focus on the five communes. Small groups of maximum 8 with chauffeured 4x4 access to vineyards not open to larger operators.
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 180 per person full-day group tour

verified.address_quoted: Place du General de Gaulle, 33250 Pauillac

wine_tours.name: Saint-Emilion Wine Tour (Tourist Office)
wine_tours.address: Bureau d'Accueil Touristique, Place des Creeneaux, 33330 Saint-Emilion, France
wine_tours.description: Official tourist office half-day guided wine tours departing from the Saint-Emilion village centre, visiting two Grand Cru estates with cellar access and structured tastings; available in English, French and Spanish.
tour_types: Village and underground church walking tour with tasting
wine_tours.price_range: EUR 35 per person half-day group tour
